reviews.content:

When you hear the sound of them chewing, you can tell how dense it is - it makes this satisfying crunchy sound! After giving it to my pup, I was shocked that their breath didn't smell bad at all, literally not one bit... We're definitely going to keep buying this!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
12살 어르신이라서 이왕이면 후코이단으로 먹여 보았습니다.
개봉하자마자 냄새가 좋아서 오? 했는데, 개코에는 더 좋게 느껴졌는지 빨리 달라고 난리입니다.
딱딱한 껌은 잘 먹지도 못하면서 괜히 하루 종일 지키느라 바쁘고, 말랑한 껌은 너무 금방 먹어치우고는 먹은 것 같지도 않은지 더 달라고 보채곤 하는데 
이 껌은 너무 단단하지도, 말랑하지도 않고 원형으로 되어 있어 조금 더 천천히 씹어 먹는 것 같아 좋습니다.
특히 털에 엉키거나 묻어나는 게 없어서 만족스럽습니다.
리뷰 사진을 충분히 못 찍은 것 같아 하나 더 까서 사진만 찍고 내일 주려 했는데 결국 영영 빼앗겨 버렸습니다. 
그만큼 기호성이 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en: Since my senior pup is 12 years old, I decided to feed her this with fucoidan. As soon as I opened it, the smell was so good I was impressed, but my dog loved it even more and kept demanding more! She's always too busy guarding hard crunchy chews that she can barely eat, and she devours soft chews so quickly that she doesn't even feel satisfied and keeps begging for more. But this chew isn't too hard or too soft, and since it's ring-shaped, she seems to chew it more slowly, which is great. I'm especially satisfied because there's no shedding or residue in her fur. I thought I'd take review photos by opening another one and give it to her tomorrow, but she ended up stealing it from me completely. That's how much she loves it.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:

​
🔎성분: 후코이단이 들어있어 항산화까지 챙겨줄 수 있다는 점이 믿음직스러워요.
​
🔎제형: 링 형태라 그런지 강아지가 앞발로 잡고 뜯기 편해 보이고, 치석 제거에도 확실히 도움이 되는 것 같아요.
​
🔎가성비: 3+1 구성이라 쟁여두기 딱 좋습니다.
​
간식 고를 때 성분이랑 기호성 모두 따지는 편인데, 이건 두 마리 토끼를 다 잡은 느낌이에요. 

다 먹으면 무조건 재구매각입니다! 몽찌처럼 입맛 까다로운 친구들에게 강력 추천해요. :)
reviews.content_en: My Mongji is usually pretty picky, but Dr. Inner Peace dental chews are so good that she comes running just from hearing the bag open! 🔍 Ingredients: I'm impressed that it contains fucoidan, which provides antioxidant benefits too. 🔍 Form: The ring shape makes it easy for my dog to grab with her front paws and chew, and it definitely seems to help with tartar removal. 🔍 Value: The 3+1 pack is perfect for stocking up. When choosing treats, I usually care about both ingredients and palatability, and this one checks both boxes. I'll definitely repurchase once she finishes! I highly recommend this to picky eaters like Mongji. :)

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 일반 덴탈껌이랑 다르게 링 모양이라 애기가 두 발로 꼬옥 잡고 씹는데 그 모습이 일단 심쿵 포인트.. 🐾 굴곡진 면이 치아 구석구석 닿으니까 치석 제거도 확실하고, 무엇보다 구강 유산균이 들어있어서 입 냄새 잡는 데 최고예요!

완전 마음에 들었습니다💚💚💚
reviews.content_en: I was pleasantly surprised by how soft it is, unlike how it looks! My pup actually prefers eating dental chews over brushing teeth, and boy does she go to town on these~the palatability is top-notch~!!! With the circular rope structure, she chews evenly on both sides. The individual packaging is hygienic and convenient for carrying one at a time! Unlike other brands' dental chews that get sticky when saliva touches them, the DENTAL RING rope brush doesn't get sticky at all. I'm absolutely loving it💚💚💚

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 껌 모양이 닿지않는 구석구석 까지 케어가 된다니 너무 좋고 개별 포장으로 깔끔하고 기호성까지 최고 👍👍👍 꾸준히 먹어보고 재구매 하러 가야겠어요 💖
reviews.content_en: It's amazing that the ring shape allows the chew to reach every corner that other shapes can't get to, it comes in individual packaging that's super convenient, and the palatability is outstanding 👍👍👍 I'm definitely going to keep giving this to my pup and will be buying again soon 💖

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
평소에 늘 길쭉한 스틱형 껌만 줬던 터라, 이렇게 동그란 링 모양 껌은 오월이 견생 처음이었습니다!
​
처음엔 '어? 이건 어떻게 잡아야 하지?' 하고 살짝 낯설어하나 싶더니, 금방 적응하고 앞발로 딱 고정해서 뜯더라고요. 가장 신기했던 건 링 모양이라 그런지 한쪽으로만 씹지 않고, 고개를 돌려가며 왼쪽 오른쪽 어금니를 골고루 사용해서 씹더라구요. 주로 왼쪽으로만 씹었는데 양쪽 다 사용하는게 신기했습니다!

​1. 틈새까지 닦이는 '니트 짜임' 🧶
일자로 매끈한 껌은 금방 뚝 끊어 먹기도 하는데, 이건 표면이 니트 옷처럼 올록볼록하게 짜여 있어서 씹을 때마다 치아에 닿는 면적이 넓어요. 울퉁불퉁한 굴곡들이 치아 사이사이에 닿으면서 자연스럽게 치석을 긁어주는 느낌이라, 일반 껌보다 양치 효과가 훨씬 좋을 듯 해요

​2. 앞발로 꽉 잡기 좋은 '링 디자인' 🐾
스틱형 껌은 중간에 크게 끊기면 그냥 씹고 삼킬 때가 많았거든요. 덴타링은 가운데 구멍이 뚫려 있어서 그런지 아이가 앞발로 걸거나 누르고 먹기에 딱 좋은 구조예요. 껌이 움직이지 않게 딱 고정하고 먹으니까 더 안정적으로 오래 씹을 수 있더라구요. 양손으로 잡고 먹는게 진짜 귀여움요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ

​3. 잇몸 피 안 나는 '쫄깃 탄탄' 식감😆
너무 딱딱한 껌은 먹고 나면 잇몸에서 피가 날 때가 있어서 걱정이었는데, 이건 손으로 눌러보면 탄탄하면서도 쫄깃한 느낌이에요. 턱 힘이 약하거나 잇몸이 예민한 아이들도 부담 없이 씹으면서 잇몸 마사지까지 될 것 같아요.

​늘 먹던 모양이 지겨운 댕댕이나, 양쪽 이빨 골고루 썼으면 하는 분들에게 이 덴타링 강추합니다! 다 먹으면 또 사러 올게요~ 👍
reviews.content_en:
I've always given Owol stick-shaped chews, so this round ring-shaped gum was a first for her! 🧶

At first, I thought she'd be a bit confused like 'Hmm, how do I grab this?' but she adapted quickly and gripped it firmly with her front paws to chew. The most amazing part was that because of the ring shape, she didn't just chew on one side—she'd turn her head back and forth, evenly using both her left and right molars. She used to chew mostly on one side, so seeing her use both was really surprising!

1. Deep cleaning between teeth with 'knit weave' texture 🧶
Regular stick chews are smooth and she'd just bite and swallow them quickly, but this one has a bumpy, knit-like textured surface. The contact area with her teeth increases with each chew. The rough textures naturally scrape tartar from between her teeth, so the tooth-brushing effect seems way better than regular chews.

2. Easy to grip with front paws with the 'ring design' 🐾
With stick chews, when they'd break in the middle, she'd just chew and swallow them. But DENTAL RING has a hole in the center, so the structure is perfect for her to hook or press with her front paws. Since the chew stays fixed in place without moving, she can chew more stably for longer. Watching her hold it with both paws is absolutely adorable! 😂

3. Chewy, firm texture that won't cause bleeding gums 😆
I was worried that overly hard chews might cause her gums to bleed, but this one feels firm yet chewy when I press it. Even dogs with weak jaws or sensitive gums can chew comfortably while also getting a nice gum massage.

I highly recommend this DENTAL RING for pups who are bored with their usual shapes or for those whose owners want them to use both sides of their teeth evenly! I'll be back to buy more when we finish these~ 👍

reviews.name: 아****
reviews.content:
양쪽 어금니 열일하게 만드는 마성의 링껌!
모찌가 반했어요 🥥🦴

바잇미 체험단으로 만나본
[닥터이너피스 덴타링 코코넛맛] 후기입니다! 🥥

모찌는 매일 저녁 양치를 하고 나면 보상으로 덴탈껌을 먹는 루틴이 있어요! (껌 먹으려고 양치 참는 서타일..🐶)
그래서 덴탈껌 고를 때 진심인 편인데, 요 덴타링은 정말 물건이네요!

✨ 모찌엄마가 느낀 덴타링 포인트!

1️⃣ 양쪽으로 번갈아 씹는 '링'의 마법! 🌀 
모찌가 평소에 한쪽으로만 씹는 습관이 있어서 반대쪽 치석이 늘 고민이었어요 😥 이건 링 형태라 그런지 모찌가 앞발로 야무지게 잡고 요리조리 돌려가며 양쪽 어금니를 다 써서 씹더라고요! 균형 있게 치석 관리되는 모습에 감동.. 감격.. 감동.. 😭👏

2️⃣ 코코넛 향에 꼬리 살랑! 기호성 갑 🥥
포장지를 뜯자마자 모찌가 벌써 자기 건 줄 알고 눈을 번쩍!

3️⃣ 양치 루틴의 완벽한 마무리 ✨

강아지에게 치아 관리가 정말 중요하잖아요.
그래서 박스는 1일 1양치를 기본으로 하고 있고, 덴탈 스프레이에 덴탈껌까지 꾸준히 사용하면서 건강한 구강 루틴을 만들어주고 있어요 🐶💚

이번에 체험하게 된 오랄프레시 덴타링 로프브러시는 기존 덴탈껌이랑 구조부터 달랐어요.

보통 덴탈껌을 주면 한쪽으로만 씹는 경우가 많아서 치아 한쪽만 자극되는 게 늘 아쉬웠는데, 이 제품은 링 타입이라 한입 ‘앙’ 물었을 때 입 안으로 쏙 들어가면서 자연스럽게 양쪽 이빨로 고르게 씹게 되더라구요.

로프처럼 꼬여있는 구조라 360도로 치아에 닿는 느낌이라 씹는 동안 브러시처럼 마찰이 생기는 구조예요.

사실 처음엔 링 모양이라 입이나 목에 걸리진 않을까 걱정돼서 옆에서 계속 지켜보면서 급여했어요.
그런데 씹으면서 조금씩 끊어내 먹는 방식이라 무리 없이 잘 먹더라구요.
너무 딱딱하지 않고 적당히 쫀득해서 오래 씹는 점도 마음에 들었어요.

그리고 무엇보다 상큼한 향이 나서 그런지 덴탈 제품에 은근 까다로운 박스 입맛에도 기호성이 정말 좋았어요.
냄새 맡자마자 먼저 달려와서 먹는 모습 보니까 매일 주는 구강관리 간식으로도 부담 없겠다는 생각이 들더라구요 😊

개별 포장이라 위생적이고, 17g이라 부담 없는 사이즈라 양치 후 마무리용으로 주기 좋았어요.

양치만으로는 부족할 수 있는 부분을 덴탈 스프레이 + 덴타링 로프브러시로 보완해주는 느낌이라 데일리 구강 루틴에 추가하기 딱 좋은 제품 같아요 💚

양쪽 치아를 고르게 사용하게 해주는 덴탈껌 찾고 계셨다면 한 번 체험해보셔도 좋을 것 같아요 🐾✨
reviews.content_en:
Dental care is really important for dogs, right? 🐶💚

So Bak does brushing once a day as a basic routine, and we're building a healthy oral care routine by consistently using dental spray and dental chews.

The ORAL FRESH Denta Ring Rope Brush I tried this time had a completely different structure from regular dental chews.

Usually when you give regular dental chews, dogs tend to chew on one side only, so I was always disappointed that only one side of the teeth gets stimulated. But because this product is ring-shaped, when Bak takes one bite with his mouth open, it naturally fits inside the mouth and he naturally chews evenly on both sides of his teeth.

Because it has a twisted rope-like structure, it feels like it touches the teeth 360 degrees, creating friction like a brush while chewing.

Honestly, at first I was worried the ring shape might get stuck in his mouth or throat, so I kept watching and supervised while giving it. But the way he eats by nibbling it off bit by bit while chewing means he has no trouble eating it at all.

I also really liked that it's not too hard and has just the right chewiness so he can chew it for a long time.

And most importantly, because it has a refreshing smell, even Bak, who is usually picky about dental products, really loved it. Seeing him rush over and eat it as soon as he smells it makes me think giving it daily as an oral care treat won't be a burden at all 😊

✔️ Ring-type dental chew
✔️ Plant-based safe recipe
✔️ Contains fucoidan
✔️ Convenient daily oral routine - 1 piece per day

Individual packaging makes it hygienic, and at 17g it's a manageable size, so it's great to give as a finishing treat after brushing.

It feels like the dental spray + Denta Ring Rope Brush complements what brushing alone might not cover, so it's a perfect product to add to a daily oral care routine 💚

If you've been looking for a dental chew that helps your dog use both sides of their teeth evenly, I think it'd be worth trying this one out 🐾✨

reviews.content_en:
Lucky tried the ORAL FRESH Denta Ring Rope Brush Fucoidan flavor.

What I liked most was that the circular rope structure allows the dog to use both sides of their teeth evenly. Thanks to the curved and slot structure, the more you chew, the more you feel the brushing effect, so I thought it was great for dental care, not just as a simple snack.

What was especially good was the texture. It's not too hard and is soft enough that you can chew it comfortably for a long time. Lucky, my 1-year-old Bichon, chewed it without any trouble.

The palatability was really great thanks to the fucoidan flavor, and she wanted to find and eat it first. Using it together with a small amount of toothpaste made the oral care effect feel even better, which was very satisfying.

I'd like to recommend it to dogs that struggle with hard dental chews.
Since you can do snacking and oral care at the same time, I'd definitely buy it again once she finishes :)

reviews.content_en:
I've never had a round dental chew before~~ She smelled it with a sniff and her eyes went wide open wanting it right away haha
This is a dog that had scaling done because of tartar and gingivitis last year and is being managed with brushing & dental chews.
Usually I brush and give her stick-shaped chews or chews with toothpaste on them, and... when I give her one on the left or right, she only chews on that one side, so I have to hold it or try the other side next time. But because this dental chew is circular, even without me holding it, she naturally chews on both sides, which is great!
It looked hard just looking at it with my eyes, but when I touched it, it wasn't too hard at all and was soft - perfect for my dog to chew.
I'm a bit embarrassed to say this, but right after scaling I was diligent about brushing, but... lately I've been lazy and skipping sometimes, and I've noticed her teeth have gotten a bit yellowed. I want to buy both types and keep giving them to her consistently.
I was really happy to be selected for the experience team and get the chance to feed my dog such a good product 😁

Experience Team Review

Just like people, dogs have a habit of chewing on their comfortable side, so when I brush, I often see food stuck on one side of their teeth.

So here's my review after using 🍩 Doctor Inner Peace DENTAL RING 🍩 —Korea's only product that ensures both sides of teeth are used evenly!

First, it's designed so that as they chew, friction against the teeth removes plaque. On days when I can't brush, I can just apply toothpaste and give it like a treat—so convenient and great!

Since it's not too hard, it has great palatability and allows for easy management!

Also, overly hard chews aren't good for the jaw joint, can damage teeth, and may cause digestive issues 🤢

🥥 Rich in dietary fiber • Gum protection • Bacteria suppression/protection

Coconut oil contains abundant antibacterial and anti-inflammatory ingredients like lauric acid, which helps suppress bacteria growth in the mouth and lower inflammation levels 👀🥥

It also contains L-theanine, so chewing time becomes a peaceful rest time 😖💗

I finally get a break from the daily tooth-brushing battle—it's a healing time for both Dusik and me 😌💚

With such great palatability, don't hesitate and just give it a try! 👍

reviews.content_en:
First, thank you so much for giving me the opportunity to try this product! Nala eats her meals in the morning and evening and always has a tartar removal chew afterward.

I used to only give her straight tartar removal chews, but this time I gave her a soft ring-shaped chew for the first time.. Before I even opened the packaging, she went wild and already took it and ran away;;ㅎㅎ When I touched it before giving it to her, it was really soft.. It's a bit sticky so it seems like it would grab onto debris in the teeth really well!! But it's not overly sticky. It's a chew with a lot of chewiness?! I thought the coconut flavor would be strong, but it wasn't at all. Nala's usual chew is short and straight, so she had a hard time holding and eating it on her own, so I always had to hold it for her. But with the ring-shaped dental chew, she holds and eats it well on her own!! I really loved how the product was designed so pets can eat it independently. I can even apply toothpaste in the grooves between the rings, and it seems like brushing works well even when she plays with it while biting! I was worried about fucoidan since she doesn't usually eat it, but I'm so grateful I got the coconut flavor! The palatability is so good that I want to repurchase!!

덕분에 귀여운 먹방모습 봤어요.
개껌리뷰도 하고싶은데 아쉽네요.
4개월뒤 아이가 6개월이 되면 그때 먹이고 반응봐야지 싶고~ 그래도 후기좋은거 보니까 구매한 후 만족도는 높을것같네요.
다음에 또! 기회가 된다면!
reviews.content_en:
I thought it would arrive late because of the long holiday, but it came right after the holiday ended, so I was honestly excited ㅋ

It's not for me but for my baby, so I checked the packaging condition and expiration date, which were pretty good. The box is big so the products look sparse, but the fact that they gave me a service product too was so nice.

My baby is only 2 months old so I couldn't give her the chew ㅜㅠ.. I should have checked better when ordering, but it says it's for 6 months and up... So I closed the box and sealed it. Luckily the expiration date is long so that's a relief~!!

Even so, I felt a bit sad, so I gave her the protein liquid that came as a service, which they said is for all ages. I was curious about the taste so I tried a drop myself, but... maybe because I'm human? It didn't taste like anything! Maybe because I only licked a tiny bit ㅋ?

Still, I didn't have confidence to drink it.. ㅠ

So I poured it in a bowl, and wow, without even taking a breath, she was slurping it down, which was so cute ㅋ After she finished it, her jaw was stained from it.

Thanks to that, I got to see a cute eating video.

I wanted to do a chew review too, but it's a shame.

In 4 months when my baby turns 6 months, I'll give it then and see how she reacts~ But looking at the good reviews, I think the satisfaction after purchase will be high.

Next time, if there's another opportunity!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
알러지가 심한 2022년생 강아지 몽실이 때문에 간식 고를 때 정말 엄청 예민한 편인데, 이 제품은 성분이 괜찮아 보여서 조심스럽게 구매해봤어요🐶🤍
평소 새로운 간식은 냄새만 맡고 잘 안 먹는 편인데 닥터이너피스 덴탈껌은 생각보다 기호성이 좋아서 몽실이가 잘 먹어줘서 놀랐어요!
특히 너무 딱딱하지 않아서 부담 없이 씹기 좋고 먹고 나서도 알러지 반응이나 눈물 심해짐 같은 게 없어서 만족하고 있습니다.
코코넛이랑 후코이단 구성이라 믿음이 갔고 3+1 구성이라 가성비도 괜찮았어요.
추가증정으로 받은 펫밀크도 잘 먹어서 기분 좋은 구매였습니다🦴🥛
예민한 강아지 키우는 분들께 한 번쯤 추천해보고 싶은 제품이에요 :)
reviews.content_en:
Since my 2022 Jindo dog Mongsil has severe allergies, I'm really sensitive when picking snacks, but this product looked okay ingredient-wise so I carefully purchased it🐶🤍

Usually, with new snacks, Mongsil just smells them and doesn't eat well, but I was surprised that Doctor Inner Peace Dental Chew had good palatability and she ate it well!

Especially since it's not too hard, it's comfortable to chew and after eating, there are no allergy reactions or increased tearing, so I'm satisfied.

The coconut and fucoidan combination gave me confidence, and the 3+1 composition had good value for money too.

The pet milk I got as a bonus gift was also eaten well, so it was a good purchase🦴🥛

It's a product I'd like to recommend to people raising sensitive dogs :)

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
평소 양치를 매일 시켜도 치석 때문에 고민 많았는데 바잇미 덴타링 덕분에 간식 주는 시간도 구강 케어 시간으로 바뀌었어요~
입 냄새도 줄고, 후추가 너무 좋아해서 하루에 한 번씩 기다리는 간식이 됐습니다!
reviews.content_en:
Even though I brush her teeth daily, I've been worried about tartar, but thanks to BITE ME DentaRing, snack time has become oral care time~

It reduces bad breath, and Pepper loves it so much that it became a snack she waits for once a day!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
동그란 모양이라 확실히 한쪽으로만 씹는게 아니고 양쪽에 닿아서 케어되는 면적이 넓네요!
딱딱하지 않아서 치아 파절 위험도 없어서 좋아요
치아가 약한편이라 딱딱한 간식은 급여하지 않는중인데
걱정없이 급여할 수 있겠어요~
기호성도 좋아서 환장하고 먹는답니다!!
reviews.content_en:
Since it's round-shaped, it definitely touches both sides instead of just chewing on one side, so the care area is wider!

Since it's not hard, there's no risk of tooth fractures, which is great.

My dog's teeth are on the weak side so I don't give her hard snacks, but I can give this without worry~

She has such good palatability that she goes crazy for it!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 이벤트당첨으로 먹어밧는데 3D원형로프구조라 치아 전체를 브러싱해주고 식물중심원료로 만들어서 알러지있는 미니핀 친구도 너무 잘 먹었답니다🥰마저 다 먹고 또 구매 할 예정이랍니다💕
reviews.content_en: I got to try it from winning an event. Since it has a 3D circular rope structure, it brushes the entire teeth, and it's made with plant-based ingredients so my mini pincher friend with allergies ate it so well🥰 After finishing, I plan to purchase again💕

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
평소에 한쪽으로만 씹어서 자꾸 한쪽 치석만 쌓이고 있는데 요건 링모양이라 양쪽 모두 씹을 수 있어서 좋아요! 
조금만 딱딱해도 혼자 못먹어서 들고오는데.. 닥터이너피스 덴탈껌은 말랑쫀득한 식감이라 혼자서도 냠냠 잘먹어요🤍
reviews.content_en:
Usually, she only chews on one side so tartar keeps building up on just one side, but since this has a ring shape, she can chew on both sides, which is great!

She struggles to eat on her own if it's even slightly hard and brings it to me, but Doctor Inner Peace Dental Chew has such a soft and chewy texture that she eats it well on her own🤍

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
“후코이단 덴탈껌” 친구들이랑 나눠먹었어요!
너무 딱딱하지않아 치아가 조금 안 좋은 아이들도 먹을수있고, 
링모양이라 요리조리 씹으면서 먹을수 있어서 좋아요. 
다먹고 또 없는지 봉지안도 확인해볼만큼 기호성이 좋아요!!
reviews.content_en:
"Fucoidan Dental Chew" - I shared it with friends!

Since it's not too hard, even dogs with slightly weak teeth can eat it, and since it's ring-shaped, they can chew it from different angles which is nice.

She liked it so much that after finishing, she even checked inside the bag to see if there was more!!
